scores.rationale: It prioritizes request access, preserves the integrator path, and stays within the pre-launch product framing.
The three screen journeys share a consistent audience hierarchy, mobile behavior, and recovery model.
The candidate provides implementable states, mobile rules, field recovery, and code-container behavior.
It establishes a clear business-first adaptation and explicitly rejects unsupported trust and pricing patterns.
Keyboard access, field errors, focus safety, mobile menu behavior, and preserved input are covered.
The brief-derived decisions and synthetic URL boundary are stated plainly, with assumptions separated from requirements.
